task_goal: Move the file sunset.jpg from Alarms within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area to the Pictures within the same sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area in the Android filesystem.
task_goal_rewrite: The file sunset.jpg is moved from the Alarms folder to the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 shared external storage area of the Android filesystem.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is present in the Pictures folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area (or its UI-equivalent label like sdk_gphone64_arm64).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file system view showing sunset.jpg listed in the Pictures folder under the relevant storage area label displayed in the UI.

checkpoints.description: The file sunset.jpg is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area (or its UI-equivalent label like sdk_gphone64_arm64).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or file system view showing the Alarms folder under the relevant storage area label displayed in the UI does not contain sunset.jpg.

checkpoints.description: Evidence confirms the operation was applied to the exact target object/value and intended context stated in the goal.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Use screenshot/UI text/action evidence to disambiguate the target identity and location before final-state verification.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: sunset.jpg is confirmed present in the Pictures folder and absent from the Alarms folder within the specified storage area.
